title: Mighty Man, Why Boast of Evil?

verses.text: God will break you down forever, snatch and tear you from your shelter. He will pluck you from the ground where the living can be found. Just men fear and say with laughter, “See the man who sought disaster, spurning God as his defense, making wealth his confidence.”

But in God’s house I’m abiding like an olive tree that’s thriving. I am trusting evermore in your steadfast love, O Lord. I give thanks with endless praises, for I know that you have done this. I will hope in your good name, in the presence of the saints.
